featureName: Remove Notification Replies Sidebar (Dead Code Cleanup)
description: Remove the 'Réponses notifs' button and 'Réponses par intervention' section from the mail sidebar. This is dead UI — email replies to notifications are already synced to intervention conversation threads (via syncEmailReplyToConversation) and managers already receive in-app + push + email notifications (via notifyManagers in the webhook). Clean up all supporting plumbing: state, props, API endpoints, SSR fetching, and repository filter code.

userStories.title: Remove notification replies UI from mailbox sidebar
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I no longer see the 'Réponses notifs' button or 'Réponses par intervention' collapsible section in the mail sidebar, because these replies now appear in intervention conversations.
acceptanceCriteria: No 'Réponses notifs' button visible in the BOITES EMAIL section
No 'Réponses par intervention' collapsible section in the sidebar
NotificationReplyGroup type export removed from mailbox-sidebar.tsx
Props cleaned: notificationRepliesCount, notificationReplyGroups, selectedInterventionId, onInterventionClick removed
Reply import from lucide-react removed if no longer used
isNotificationRepliesOpen state removed
totalUnread calculation no longer includes notificationRepliesCount
Sidebar visibility condition no longer checks notificationRepliesCount
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed Reply icon import, NotificationReplyGroup type, 4 notification-reply props, isNotificationRepliesOpen state, 'Réponses notifs' button, entire 'Réponses par intervention' collapsible section. totalUnread simplified. Visibility guard simplified.

userStories.title: Remove notification replies state and props from mail-client
userStories.description: Clean up MailClient component: remove all notification-reply-related state, props, handlers, and sidebar prop passing.
acceptanceCriteria: State removed: notificationRepliesCount, notificationReplyGroups, selectedInterventionId
Handler removed: handleInterventionClick
Props removed from MailClientProps: initialNotificationRepliesCount, initialNotificationReplyGroups
Sidebar props cleaned: no longer passes notificationRepliesCount, notificationReplyGroups, selectedInterventionId, onInterventionClick
fetchEmailConnections no longer reads/sets notificationRepliesCount
handleSourceChange and handleFolderChange no longer reference selectedInterventionId
'notification_replies' source filter removed from handleInterventionClick (entire handler gone)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed NotificationReplyGroup import, 2 props from MailClientProps, 3 state vars, entire handleInterventionClick handler, selectedInterventionId from folder/source handlers, 4 sidebar props.

userStories.title: Remove notification replies SSR data fetching and API endpoint
userStories.description: Clean up server-side: remove getNotificationReplyGroups from page.tsx, remove notificationRepliesCount from getEmailConnections, and delete the /api/emails/notification-replies API route.
acceptanceCriteria: getNotificationReplyGroups function removed from page.tsx
notificationReplyGroups removed from Promise.all and MailClient props in page.tsx
getEmailConnections no longer queries/returns notificationRepliesCount
NotificationReplyGroup import removed from page.tsx
/api/emails/notification-replies/route.ts file deleted
/api/emails/connections/route.ts no longer counts/returns notificationRepliesCount
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Deleted /api/emails/notification-replies/route.ts. Removed getNotificationReplyGroups (50 lines). Simplified getEmailConnections return type. Removed notification count query from connections API. Cleaned Promise.all and MailClient props.

userStories.title: Clean up notification_replies source filter in repository and client service
userStories.description: Remove the 'notification_replies' source filter branch from the email repository and clean up the client service JSDoc.
acceptanceCriteria: email.repository.ts: 'notification_replies' source filter branch removed from getEmailsByFolder
email.repository.ts: 'notification_replies' check removed from sent replies query
email-client.service.ts: JSDoc updated (no more 'notification_replies' option)
emails API route: JSDoc/comment about 'notification_replies' removed
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Removed 'notification_replies' branch from getEmailsByFolder source filter. Simplified sent replies query condition. Updated JSDoc in client service and API route.
